title: Unique Loot
description: Loot chests are unique for every player and can't be destroyed, so no one misses out on loot, no matter when they start playing.
body:
![Unique Inventories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3142a2f4bd7a66de33faf9ce00794539756ce5fc.webp)

### Every single player on the server can loot the same loot chest!

The race to be the first to discover structures is over, and you'll never open a loot chest to find someone's left-over trash again. You and your friends can explore structures together without worrying about who gets the loot. Rather than generating new ones, Unique Loot encourages players to explore existing structures, which reduces the size of the world.

This plugin generates random loot for each player who opens a chest or barrel that has a loot table. You cannot interact with loot chests using hoppers or break them unless you are in Creative Mode. Unique Loot is compatible with custom loot tables of other data packs. If the plugin is uninstalled (please don't), all loot chests simply become
vanilla loot chests.


<details>
<summary>Developers Note</summary>

While the core features of the plugin work, it's still in development; expect some small things to break. This currently includes copper golems and some datapacks that add custom loot containers, not just custom loot tables.

</details>
